onStop.description: 显示 Windows 系统通知（支持中文）

hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $candidates = @('./.snow/hooks/onUserMessage-notify.ps1','./hooks/onUserMessage-notify.ps1','./onUserMessage-notify.ps1'); $p = $candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $p) { throw 'Cannot find onUserMessage-notify.ps1' }; & $p }"
